questions.question: Who chaired the Drafting Committee of the Indian Constitution?
Which leader is known as the 'Iron Man of India'?
What was the main purpose of integrating princely states?
questions.answer: To ensure political unity of India.

questions.question: In which year was the States Reorganisation Act passed?
Which commission recommended linguistic reorganisation of states?
Which economic model influenced the Second Five-Year Plan?
Who proposed the Mahalanobis model for economic planning?
Which sector received major emphasis in the Second Five-Year Plan?
Which scientist is known as the father of the Green Revolution in India?
Which two states benefited the most from the Green Revolution?
What agricultural innovation increased crop productivity during the Green Revolution?
Which principle divides powers between the central and state governments?
Which institution conducts elections in India?
What is meant by national integration?
questions.answer: Unity among diverse communities of the country.

questions.question: Which democratic principle allows citizens to elect representatives?
Which organization is responsible for India's space research?
Which Indian scientist is known as the father of the Indian space program?
What process refers to the growth of cities due to industrial development?
Which sector created employment opportunities in cities after independence?
What is the meaning of economic planning?
questions.answer: Planning the economic development of the country.

questions.question: Which institution interprets the Constitution of India?
Which body makes laws in India?
What term describes the process of building a strong and united country?
What is meant by national development?
questions.answer: Overall progress of the nation in economic, social, and political fields.

questions.question: Which concept describes India's unity despite cultural diversity?
